titles.en: Chapter on What a Person Should Say When Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another
Chapter on What a Person Should Say When Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَقْضِي عَنْ أَخِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ اَلْحَجَّ هَلْ يَنْبَغِي لَهُ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ بِشَيْءٍ قَالَ «نَعَمْ يَقُولُ عِنْدَ إِحْرَامِهِ بَعْدَ مَا يُحْرِمُ اَللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصَابَنِي فِي سَفَرِي هَذَا مِنْ نَصَبٍ أَوْ شِدَّةٍ أَوْ بَلاَءٍ أَوْ شَعَثٍ فَأْجُرْ فُلاَناً فِيهِ وَ أْجُرْنِي فِي قَضَائِي عَنْهُ ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَقْضِي عَنْ أَخِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَوْ عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنَ اَلنَّاسِ اَلْحَجَّ هَلْ يَنْبَغِي لَهُ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ بِشَيْءٍ قَالَ «نَعَمْ يَقُولُ عِنْدَ إِحْرَامِهِ بَعْدَ مَا يُحْرِمُ اَللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصَابَنِي فِي سَفَرِي هَذَا مِنْ نَصَبٍ أَوْ شِدَّةٍ أَوْ بَلاَءٍ أَوْ شَعَثٍ فَأْجُرْ فُلاَناً فِيهِ وَ أْجُرْنِي فِي قَضَائِي عَنْهُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2967 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I asked him about a man performing Hajj on behalf of his brother, his father, or another person. Should he say anything specific?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, after entering into Ihram, he should say: 'O Allah (swt), whatever hardship, difficulty, trial, or dishevelment I experience during this journey, grant its reward to [the person on whose behalf the Hajj is performed], and reward me for fulfilling it on their behalf.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2967 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
I asked him about a man performing Hajj on behalf of his brother, his father, or another person. Should he say anything specific?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, after entering into Ihram, he should say: 'O Allah (swt), whatever hardship, difficulty, trial, or dishevelment I experience during this journey, grant its reward to [the person on whose behalf the Hajj is performed], and reward me for fulfilling it on their behalf.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2967 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What a Person Should Say When Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another

segments: مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ : إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ عَنْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ إِخْوَانِكَ، فَائْتِ الْحَجَرَ الْأَسْوَدَ وَقُلْ: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنْ فُلَانٍ.
arabic.text: مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ : إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَطُوفَ بِالْبَيْتِ عَنْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ إِخْوَانِكَ، فَائْتِ الْحَجَرَ الْأَسْوَدَ وَقُلْ: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنْ فُلَانٍ.

segments:
Hadith.2968 - In a narration from Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar, Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"If you wish to perform Tawaf around the Ka'bah on behalf of one of your brothers, go to the Black Stone and say: 'In the name of Allah (swt), O Allah (swt), accept this from [the name of the person].'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2968 - In a narration from Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar, Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"If you wish to perform Tawaf around the Ka'bah on behalf of one of your brothers, go to the Black Stone and say: 'In the name of Allah (swt), O Allah (swt), accept this from [the name of the person].'"

titles.en: Chapter on What a Person Should Say When Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another

segments: : سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْأَوَّلَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَحُجُّ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُسَمِّيهِ بِاسْمِهِ قَالَ «اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لاَ تَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ.
arabic.text: : سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْأَوَّلَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَحُجُّ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُسَمِّيهِ بِاسْمِهِ قَالَ «اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لاَ تَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ خَافِيَةٌ.

segments:
Hadith.2969 - It was narrated from al-Bazanti that a man asked Abu al-Hasan al-Awwal (as) about a person performing Hajj on behalf of another. Should he mention that person's name explicitly?
Imam (as) replied: "Allah (swt), the Exalted, is not unaware of anything."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2969 - It was narrated from al-Bazanti that a man asked Abu al-Hasan al-Awwal (as) about a person performing Hajj on behalf of another. Should he mention that person's name explicitly?
Imam (as) replied: "Allah (swt), the Exalted, is not unaware of anything."

narratorChain.raw: 2969 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْبَزَنْطِيِّ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What a Person Should Say When Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another

segments: اَلرَّجُلِ يَحُجُّ عَنِ اَلْإِنْسَانِ يَذْكُرُهُ فِي اَلْمَوَاطِنِ كُلِّهَا قَالَ «إِنْ شَاءَ فَعَلَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ لَمْ يَفْعَلْ اَللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ قَدْ حَجَّ عَنْهُ وَ لَكِنْ يَذْكُرُهُ عِنْدَ اَلْأُضْحِيَّةِ إِذَا هُوَ ذَبَحَهَا».
arabic.text: اَلرَّجُلِ يَحُجُّ عَنِ اَلْإِنْسَانِ يَذْكُرُهُ فِي اَلْمَوَاطِنِ كُلِّهَا قَالَ «إِنْ شَاءَ فَعَلَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ لَمْ يَفْعَلْ اَللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ قَدْ حَجَّ عَنْهُ وَ لَكِنْ يَذْكُرُهُ عِنْدَ اَلْأُضْحِيَّةِ إِذَا هُوَ ذَبَحَهَا».

segments:
Hadith.2970 - It was narrated from Muthanna ibn Abdul-Salam, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a person performing Hajj on behalf of someone else. Should he mention that person’s name at every station?
Imam (as) said: "If he wishes, he may do so, and if he wishes, he may not. Allah (swt) knows that he has performed Hajj on their behalf. However, he should mention the person's name when offering the sacrifice (udhiyah) at the time of slaughter."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2970 - It was narrated from Muthanna ibn Abdul-Salam, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a person performing Hajj on behalf of someone else. Should he mention that person’s name at every station?
Imam (as) said: "If he wishes, he may do so, and if he wishes, he may not. Allah (swt) knows that he has performed Hajj on their behalf. However, he should mention the person's name when offering the sacrifice (udhiyah) at the time of slaughter."

narratorChain.raw: 2970 - وَ رَوَى مُثَنَّى بْنُ عَبْدِ اَلسَّلاَمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي
